heroSection.line2: I'm Johan, a Software Engineer passionate about crafting user-friendly web apps. Check out my work below!

aboutMe.phrase1: 📚 I initially stopped studying after completing a Technological Baccalaureate. From odd jobs to odd jobs, I quickly realized that this context would not be enough for me. So, at the age of 21, I decided to resume my studies and pursue a degree in e-commerce.
aboutMe.phrase2: 🏋️‍♂️ These studies allowed me to work as an SEO specialist for 6 years. This experience taught me about the functioning of the professional world, teamwork, the weight of responsibilities, as well as managing a back office and search engine optimization.
aboutMe.phrase3: 🍀 As a SEO specialist, working closely with developers sparked my interest in this highly technical field. Therefore, I enrolled in a 6-month bootcamp training program to acquire the fundamentals of web programming and coding. Following that, I continued my learning journey through an apprenticeship program, pursuing a degree in Web and Mobile Applications Integration/Development with a specialization in React and Node.js.
aboutMe.phrase4: 🍾 Since then, I have worked with several companies on complete integrations, provided assistance to deliver projects on time, made modifications, and added new features...
aboutMe.phrase5: 👷 Today, drawing strength from my journey, I master the intricacies of the Agile methodology, the principles of Clean Code, and CI/CD pipelines, ensuring optimal scalability and maintainability for each web application I develop. My diverse experience, spanning from SEO to programming, enables me to bring a unique perspective to every project.
aboutMe.phrase6: 🧘‍♂️ As a Web Developer since 2020, I thoroughly enjoy working with Nuxt & NextJs in an Agile environment, adhering to clean code principles, and implementing CI/CD pipelines. I take pleasure in transforming mockups of various styles into dynamic and interactive websites to enhance the user experience.

items.title: Software Engineer - Frontend
items.description: As a Frontend Engineer at Encore Mieux, I design and develop an innovative application that allows hotel guests to check in automatically, access the hotel, and unlock their rooms directly from their smartphones. The app provides a seamless, contactless experience while optimizing access management and guest satisfaction through a modern and intuitive interface.

items.title: Software engineer
items.description: As a frontend developer at Winter Energies, I create modern, high-performance user interfaces with Next.js, TailwindCSS, and TypeScript, contributing to sustainable energy consumption by delivering scalable and reliable solutions.

items.title: Software engineer
items.description: Building robust real estate management software to streamline operations and enhance efficiency for independent real estate agents.

items.title: Freelance Developer
items.description: Delivering tailor-made solutions to clients, ensuring their unique needs are met with high-quality development expertise.

items.title: Front-End Developer
items.description: Crafting engaging and user-friendly front-end experiences for clients, helping them achieve their online presence goals.

items.title: Front-end & Back-end Developer
items.description: Insurance brokerage website that allows you to quickly compare offers from different insurers. Once the visitor fills out the form, their information is sent via an API to a CRM to manage the new client's file.

items.title: Web Analyst (6 years)
items.description: Providing insights and optimizations to maximize website performance and drive business growth through data-driven strategies.

items.company: Large Retail Chains | Garden Centers | Animation
items.title: Various jobs in different fields
items.description: Acquired versatile skills and valuable experience by working in diverse roles across multiple industries.

items.title: Mio Tutore - AI Language Learning App
items.description: An interactive language learning application powered by AI, offering personalized voice and written conversations tailored to your level. Features include voice mode with immersive AI conversations, written mode with real-time corrections, personalized CEFR quizzes, multi-language support (10+ languages), progress tracking with contextual memory, and a freemium subscription model via Stripe. The app supports learning Italian, English, French, Spanish, German, Portuguese, Russian, Japanese, Korean, and Chinese with adaptive progression from A1 to C2 levels.

items.title: AI-Powered Movie & TV Show Recommender App
items.description: A cross-platform React Native app that gives personalized movie or TV show recommendations based on a custom prompt handled by Gemini. Users can specify the type of content, number of suggestions, and apply filters (rating, release date, streaming platform). The AI returns a friendly message and a set of detailed cards populated with TMDB data.

items.title: CV Generator
items.description: Built with Nuxt and Puppeteer, this project allows me to generate a PDF resume. The source code is available on GitHub.

items.title: Walletoo - Personal Finance Manager
items.description: Walletoo is a personal finance management assistant. It enables straightforward financial management by simply logging in and entering monthly income and expenses. Walletoo calculates disposable income and provides suggestions for savings, graphs, etc.

items.title: Workout Session Generator [mobile-friendly only]
items.description: ma-sante.fr is a workout session generator 💪. This web app generates sessions with different exercises to optimize results. Accompanied by an animated GIF, the exercises are easy to reproduce.

items.title: Piano
items.description: From recording the sound of the keys to design, this project taught me how to handle events and performance! Plus, you can spend hours on it without needing to buy one 🤓

items.title: Web Calculator
items.description: Project carried out to deepen my knowledge of Vanilla JavaScript. You can choose between basic calculations or advanced calculations. Learning light/night mode.

items.title: Markdown Previewer
items.description: Markdown project created for a React training. Deployed on GitHub Pages.

contact.phrase: Feel free to reach out to me via email for collaborations or inquiries.

footer.built_with: Built with Nuxt and TailwindCSS with ❤️
